text:
13 Oct 2025 
   
  
Navaneethan 
2/84 South Street 
Chinnakovilankulam Tenkasi  
Tamil Nadu 627953 
 
Dear Navaneethan, 
 
Thank you for exploring career opportunities with EGC Global Services . You have successfully completed 
our initial selection process, and we are pleased to offer you the Internship with us. Your initial posting will 
be at our Kochi Office – 2B-1, Thapasya, Infopark, Kakkanad. Your compensation details are as follows: 
 
This internship will commence on 22nd October 2025 and is expected to continue until April 22nd, 2026. You 
will be reporting to Nibi Thomas, Client Service and Compliance. 
 
Your internship compensation would be Rs. 10,000 Per Month for the internship duration of 6 Months.  
 
As an intern, you will be expected to maintain confidentiality regarding all company information and adhere 
to the company’s code of conduct and policies. 
 
You are requested to join us at the latest by 22nd October 2025. In case you do not report   by this date, this 
offer letter shall stand withdrawn.  
 
Please confirm your acceptance of the above terms and inform your joining date in our organization, by 16 
Oct 2025. 
 
We are excited about the prospect of you joining our team and contributing to EGC Global Services. We 
believe this experience will be mutually beneficial, offering you valuable insight and exposure to industry 
practices. 
 
 
 
Best regards, 
 
 
 
 
Asha Nair 
Manager – Human Resources

Navaneethan K 
navaneethan1810@gmail.com | 9751652396 | Kochi | LinkedIn| Github 
 
Executive Summary  
    
Data Analyst with experience in SQL, Python, and Power BI, and a strong foundation in data analysis, data 
engineering, and machine learning. Skilled in building data pipelines, dashboards, and predictive models to process 
and analyze large datasets, improve data quality, and generate actionable insights. Hands -on experience through 
internship and project work, contributing to solving problems, data-driven decision-making, and business impact. 
 
Technical Skills 
   
● Programming Languages: Python (Scikit-learn, Numpy, Pandas), SQL 
● Machine Learning: Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, Supervised Learning(Linear Regression, Logistic 
Regression, Random Forest), Unsupervised Learning(K-Means, Hierarchical Clustering) 
● Tools: Power BI (DAX, Power Query, Power BI Service), MS Excel, Jupyter Notebook, Git, Docker 
● Databases: MySQL, SQLite, PostgreSQL 
 
Professional Experience 
  
EGC Global Services                    October 2025 – April 2026 
 Associate Analyst Intern 
● Maintained and managed 1M+ product records, ensuring data accuracy, consistency, and proper 
organization of product information. 
● Performed product research and data analysis, contributed to machine learning model development for 
classification, and supported dashboard creation and data pipeline maintenance. 
● Identified data issues and improved data quality, leading to a 20% increase in working efficiency while 
consistently meeting project deadlines. 
● Collaborated with a team of 6 and cross-functional teams, supporting project execution and sharing AI-
related knowledge to improve team productivity. 
Education 
 
B.Sc Data Science         August 2022 – October 2025 
CGPA: 7.42/10 
Periyar Maniammai University, Thanjavur 
 
Projects 
 
Sector-Wise Stock Market Prediction - Python, Scikit-learn, Numpy, Pandas, Matplotlib 
● Built and deployed a stock prediction web application by cleaning data and training multiple ML models, 
achieving around 80% accuracy for real-time predictions. 
E-commerce Data Pipeline - SQLite, Python, Pandas 
● Built a modular ETL pipeline using Python and SQL, implementing medallion architecture for data cleaning, 
validation, aggregation, and loading into a SQLite warehouse for analytics. 
B2B Sales Analysis - SQL, Power BI, DAX, Power Query 
● Analyzed 12K B2B sales records in Power BI, cleaned and transformed data using Power Query and built table 
relationships through data modeling; identified a 25.53% conversion rate and key enterprise revenue drivers.

# Research Assistant Sample Document

## Overview
This is a sample research document for testing the RAG pipeline.

## Key Findings
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation improves answer accuracy.
- FAISS is used for vector similarity search.
- Ollama provides local LLM responses without cloud APIs.

## Conclusion
The Research Assistant can answer questions based on uploaded documents.
